proof.help.gradeKeepDesc: Your grade rises with PRs, but drops one level after 4 weeks of inactivity. Stay consistent!

sub.faq.title: FAQ
sub.faq.q1: What's the difference between Free and Premium?
sub.faq.a1:
[Free Plan]
- AI workout plans limited to 2
- AI chat limited to 3
- 1 growth prediction report only

[Premium]
- Unlimited AI workout plans
- Unlimited AI chat
- Full growth prediction reports
- Level-based detailed analysis
- Per-session AI analysis reports
- Unlimited AI nutrition coach chat
sub.faq.a2: Payment is securely processed via KakaoPay. Your payment info is encrypted and the subscription auto-renews monthly.
sub.faq.a3: Currently only KakaoPay is available. We are working on adding more payment options.
sub.faq.a4: Go to Profile tab > Subscription management. After cancellation, premium features remain active until the end of the current billing period.
sub.faq.a5.bold: no AI workout plans were generated
sub.faq.a5.prefix: , full refunds are available within 7 days of payment. Requesting a refund will automatically cancel your subscription. See the
sub.faq.q6: How do I download the app?
sub.faq.a6:
Add to your home screen from Chrome/Safari to use it like a native app.

[Android]
1. Open ohunjal AI in Chrome
2. Tap ⋮ menu (top right)
3. Select 'Add to Home screen'

[iPhone/iPad]
1. Open ohunjal AI in Safari
2. Tap share button (□↑)
3. Select 'Add to Home Screen'

growth.reading.ml.label: Prediction Model
growth.reading.ml.title: What is regression-based ML?
growth.reading.ml.desc1:
Ohunjal AI collects various inputs from your workout data:
total volume (weight × reps), set count,
duration, frequency, body weight, and more.
growth.reading.ml.desc2:
This data is fed into XGBoost (tree-based ensemble)
and paper-validated regression analysis to predict
calorie burn, strength growth, and volume trends.
growth.reading.ml.desc3:
The more data we have, the more precisely
we learn your unique patterns.

Recommended base
• 10K sub-50 — 30-min continuous run experience
• Half sub-2 — recent 10K under 55:00
• Full sub-3 — 50km+/week + Half under 1:30
